item.title: Open-World Games That Let You Abuse Political Power
item.description:
More often than not, open-world games allow players to live the life of their dreams, all the while offering them total freedom. Some games let you be a superhero who can accomplish incredible deeds, while others whisk you away to a peaceful land where you can farm, build, and mingle at your leisure. Then, a select few games are all about obtaining ultimate power and abusing the heck out of it.

We aren't talking about physically OP characters here, but rather politicians or political agents who use intimidation or information to get what they want. Surprisingly, or maybe not, very few open-world games cast players in roles with political power. You are far more likely to be the rebel than the king, with the latter generally left for strategy games like Crusader Kings 3 and Tropico . Still, a couple of exceptions exist.

Fable 3 Lets You Become An Evil King

State Tyranny

Fable 3
8 /10
Released
October 26, 2010

WHERE TO PLAY

SUBSCRIPTION
DIGITAL

Developer(s)
Lionhead Studios
Genre(s)
Action RPG
Platform(s)
PC, Xbox 360
Powered by

For its first half, Fable 3 presents you as the noble leader of a revolution, with your goal being to take down your tyrannical older brother. As you cannot do this alone, you spend your "campaign trail" making all sorts of promises to different political factions, and these declarations are binding. You agree to prioritize the kingdom's prosperity and the people's happiness if you gain the throne.

In a genuinely cool twist that most games wouldn't try, Fable 3 crowns you as the new monarch around halfway through the story, and you get to rule Albion for the rest of the playthrough. As the king, you need 6.5 million gold coins to save the citizens from extinction; however, that target grows by about 2 million if you decide to be a good and honorable ruler. While morally sound decisions drain the treasury, corrupt choices fill it, giving you a clear financial incentive to break your promises.

Do you want to be the beloved ruler of a bankrupt kingdom? Or the hated dictator of a stable, rich kingdom? Maybe you can have your cake and eat it too, but it isn't easy.

The Outer Worlds Lets You Become The Board's Weapon

Corporate Tyranny

The Outer Worlds
9 /10
Released
October 25, 2019

WHERE TO PLAY

SUBSCRIPTION
DIGITAL
FX Wiki Wiki

Developer(s)
Obsidian Entertainment
Genre(s)
RPG
Platform(s)
Switch, Xbox One, PS4, PC
Powered by

The Outer Worlds exists in a universe of extreme deregulation, where people merely exist as assets of corporations. Although not the one in power, the protagonist starts as a cog in the machine since they literally pass a test to become colonists; however, after their journey to Halcyon doesn't go to plan, they wake up with a new outlook and the option to decide their fate. Now, you decide what type of "hero" you want to be, so you can very much be the freedom fighter that breaks down The Board's control over Halcyon. Conversely, you can help ensure that the corporation remains in power.

Cyberpunk 2077 deserves an honorable mention here, as you can also act as a corporate puppet.

Most people will probably side with Phineas against The Board, just because that is clearly the most "canon" direction to take. There's also more content if you go down the good route. However, it is way more fun to be a grotesquely evil corporate soldier who participates in the starvation and systemic cleansing of Halycon's citizens. The Outer Worlds presents The Board as complete and utter idiots who are comically corrupt, and you can be their stooge.

Who’s That Character?

Identify the silhouettes before time runs out.

5.0 s
0 / 10

Results

0

High Score: 0

—

Who’s That Character? Identify the silhouettes before time runs out.

5.0 s
0 / 10

High Score: 0 —
More Games

Fallout 4 Lets You Feed The Troops

Military Tyranny

Fallout 4
9 /10
Released
November 10, 2015

WHERE TO PLAY

SUBSCRIPTION
DIGITAL
PHYSICAL
FX Wiki Wiki GGMods Mods

Developer(s)
Bethesda
Genre(s)
RPG, Action
Platform(s)
PC, PlayStation 4, PlayStation 5, Xbox One, Xbox Series X, Xbox Series S
Powered by

This one is a bit complicated.

Fallout 4 doesn't present any of its factions/routes as the obvious best solution for both the protagonist and the Commonwealth. Due to its history, reputation, power, and resources, the Brotherhood of Steel arguably seems the most likely to bring a sense of order and safety to the wasteland. However, the faction follows the "might is right" and "for the greater good" mantras, achieving its goal through authoritarian control and widespread sacrifice. The Brotherhood seeks to save humanity from the Institute, an act that requires handing over control to them.

A few quests have you essentially acting as a warlord for the Brotherhood, but "Feeding the Troops" grants you the opportunity to abuse your authority in an extremely vile way. Basically, you need to get crops from farmers, which can be accomplished in a few ways (depending on your build and skills). Besides just buying the crops, you can also threaten, persuade, or kill the farmers, and the latter three are certainly the most cost-effective ways to approach the situation. Even though you need to pay a lot of caps to go down the good route, the fact that it is an option means you have to actively decide to be corrupt.

Saints Row 4 Lets You Cure Cancer (For PR Points)

Presidential Tyranny

Saints Row 4
8 /10
Released
August 20, 2013

WHERE TO PLAY

DIGITAL
PHYSICAL

Developer(s)
Volition
Genre(s)
Third-Person Shooter, Open-World
Platform(s)
PS4, PS3, Xbox One, Xbox 360, Switch, PC, Stadia
Powered by

After a brief intro, Saints Row 4 catches up with the protagonist at the White House, revealing that the gang leader somehow found themselves reigning over the free world. Then, they (and you) have to make a very, very difficult choice by selecting one of two executive bills: Cure Cancer or End World Hunger. Which one will boost your approval rating the most?

Subscribe to the newsletter for gaming power analysis and more

Explore how games wield political power and why those design choices matter, subscribe to the newsletter for deeper breakdowns, case studies, and broader game analysis that extend beyond a single example.
By subscribing, you agree to receive newsletter and marketing emails, and accept our Terms of Use and Privacy Policy. You can unsubscribe anytime.

Obviously, Saints Row 4 is so over-the-top that it is basically a farce, and your run as the President of the United States of America involves exactly 0 important decisions that impact the rest of the game. However, in this 5-minute section, you don't paint yourself in glory.

Once the alien invasion happens, you literally become an overpowered politician.

item.title: Marathon: How to Use Anomaly Specimens
item.description:
If you've played Dire Marsh (Night), you're likely to have come across an Anomaly Specimen (if you want to know how to get one, we'll cover that too, so stick around). Anomaly Specimens aren't exactly the kind of item you want to extract with, in fact, it's actually the opposite.

Anomaly Specimens are faction-specific contract items for Traxus and MIDA , so if you don't currently have a contract that requires an Anomaly Specimen, then you should just get rid of it; otherwise, you're carrying worthless loot that's stopping you from using your abilities.

How to Get Anomaly Specimens in Marathon

You can only get an Anomaly Specimen from a Hazardous Drone. These drones will spawn at random on Dire Marsh (Night), and your HUD will be updated if one enters the map, as it will say "Hazardous Drone Detected". Underneath the text, you will be given the location of the drone .

Once you spot the Hazardous Drone, which shouldn't be too hard as it has a glowing white light around it, you can shoot it. After a few bullets, it will teleport away, and you'll need to find it a second and third time . Upon the third time of shooting it, the drone will crash and drop loot.

The Hazardous Drone can now be looted, and inside its cargo boxes, you can find Anomaly Specimens. However, before you pick them up, you should be aware that you'll get the OS: Ability Regen Paused debuff , which means you cannot regenerate or use abilities.

You should only bother to pick up the Anomaly Specimen if you have the corresponding contract for it with Traxus or MIDA. If not, then you should ignore them. If you do have the contract, keep reading!

How to Use the Anomaly Specimen in Marathon

  • If you have the Traxus quest, pick up the Anomaly Specimen and take it to a DCON station, which can be found on the map.
  • If you have the MIDA quest, pick up the Anomaly Specimen and take it to an Incinerator, which you can view on the map.

We have more Marathon guides that might be useful for you:

  • How to PvE
  • How to Use the Cradle
  • Best Weapon Tier List
  • Best Runners Tier List
  • How to Level All Factions
  • How Many Players Per Match?
  • PvP Tips & Tricks
  • How to Get Lockbox Keys
  • All Weapon Types & Stats
9 /10

Marathon

Follow
Followed
Extraction Shooter
FPS
Multiplayer
Systems
OpenCritic Reviews
Top Critic Avg: 81 /100 Critics Rec: 72%
Released
March 5, 2026

item.title: How to Unlock All KRS-7.62 Camos & Attachments in Black Ops 7 & Warzone
item.description:
Black Ops 7 and Warzone Season 4 are racking up the content drops, bringing fresh new weapons to grind for and unlock. One of these weapons that players can get at launch is the KRS-7.62 Marksman Rifle, which comes with its own unique Prestige Camos and more to unlock. Here is your checklist for every KRS-7.62 Marksman Rifle Camo Challenge in Black Ops 7 and Warzone .

item.content:encoded:
Black Ops 7 and Warzone Season 4 are racking up the content drops, bringing fresh new weapons to grind for and unlock. One of these weapons that players can get at launch is the KRS-7.62 Marksman Rifle, which comes with its own unique Prestige Camos and more to unlock. Here is your checklist for every KRS-7.62 Marksman Rifle Camo Challenge in Black Ops 7 and Warzone .

item.title: Roblox Heavyweight Fishing Codes (June 2026)
item.description:
In Heavyweight Fishing on Roblox , you grab your rod and tackle massive sea beasts in sunny oceans full of treasures. Start with a basic setup, cast lines to hook giant sharks or rare glowing fish, then sell them for cash to upgrade rods, bait, and boats that catch even heavier hauls. Explore new islands, battle weather storms, and climb leaderboards as the top angler.

Heavyweight Fishing is a relaxing thrill of patient waits, huge tugs, and cheers with pals. Working codes for this Roblox game can provide you with free cash and crystals right away, helping you snag pro gear quicker without slow small-fish grinds, allowing you to hook monsters fast and rule the waves.

Updated June 4, 2026, by Artur Novichenko: Heavyweight Fishing has a fresh set of active codes available, mostly tied to recent updates, likes milestones, and visit celebrations. The newest codes reward players with Tickets and Crystals, giving a solid boost for progression, upgrades, and in-game upgrades. Since multiple codes are active at once, players can claim a good amount of resources in one go. With more updates likely to drop additional rewards in the future, it’s worth checking back regularly for new codes and bonuses.

All Heavyweight Fishing Codes

Working Heavyweight Fishing Codes

Codes

Rewards

12MVisits

Tickets and Crystals (NEW)

12M5Visits

Tickets and Crystals (NEW)

13MVisits

Tickets and Crystals (NEW)

13M5Visits

Tickets and Crystals (NEW)

32KLikes

Tickets and Crystals (NEW)

33KLikes

Tickets and Crystals (NEW)

SageUPD

Tickets and Crystals (NEW)

Expired Heavyweight Fishing Codes

  • 9MVisits – 15 Tickets, 25 Crystals
  • 26KLikes – 5 Tickets, 15 Crystals, 20K Cash
  • 27KLikes – 5 Tickets, 15 Crystals, 20K Cash
  • ORB – 50 Crystals
  • 9M5Visits – 15 Tickets, 25 Crystals
  • SorryForShutdown – 5 Tickets, 10 Crystals, 100K Cash
  • 8M5Visits – 15 Tickets, 25 Crystals
  • Hit2KActives – 100 Tickets, 100 Crystals
  • 3KActives – 5 Crystals
  • 2K5Actives – 10K Cash
  • 2KActives – 5 Crystals
  • 1K5Actives – 10K Cash
  • 1KActives – 2 Crystals

Roblox codes instantly fill your account with cash for cool rods or crystals for luck boosts that snag rare glowing fish way sooner, without endless casts on tiny minnows that barely pay off. New anglers skip newbie slumps where weak lines snap on big bites, letting players test island farms or weather dodges confidently.

Without these codes, progress feels slow, but freebies spark fun hunts. The level seas fare air during updates, fueling cheers and trade brags with friends. Devs drop them for actives likes to ensure the game stays fresh.

How to Redeem Heavyweight Fishing Codes

  • Jump into Heavyweight Fishing on Roblox .
  • Click the Code button on the left side of your screen.
  • Type a working code into the text box.
  • Hit Redeem to claim your cash or crystals.

How to Get More Heavyweight Fishing Codes

Your primary source of all the freebie drops is always the official Discord channel of the game. Also, you can check out the official Roblox group of the game.

And we update our article regularly with the newest codes for this Roblox game, so bookmark this page and check back every few days—that's your easiest way to snag fresh rewards first and keep catching huge fish.

Roblox
Released
September 1, 2006

WHERE TO PLAY

DIGITAL

ESRB
Teen / Diverse Content: Discretion Advised, In-Game Purchases (Includes Random Items), Users Interact
Genre(s)
Game Creation System
Platform(s)
PlayStation 4, Xbox One, PC, Android, iOS, Meta Quest 2, Meta Quest Pro
Powered by

Roblox codes instantly fill your account with cash for cool rods or crystals for luck boosts that snag rare glowing fish way sooner, without endless casts on tiny minnows that barely pay off. New anglers skip newbie slumps where weak lines snap on big bites, letting players test island farms or weather dodges confidently.

Without these codes, progress feels slow, but freebies spark fun hunts. The level seas fare air during updates, fueling cheers and trade brags with friends. Devs drop them for actives likes to ensure the game stays fresh.

How to Redeem Heavyweight Fishing Codes

  • Jump into Heavyweight Fishing on Roblox .

How to Get More Heavyweight Fishing Codes

Your primary source of all the freebie drops is always the official Discord channel of the game. Also, you can check out the official Roblox group of the game.

item.title: 6 Gaming Franchises That Swapped Their Iconic Heroes For Heroines
item.description:
In all media forms, long-running franchises evolve, be it as a reflection of cultural changes or simply to take the story in a fresh direction. While series like Tomb Raider and, naturally, Mario are too intrinsically tied to their icons for their mainline entries to completely move on, plenty of video game franchises have swapped protagonists over the decades. Devil May Cry , Metal Gear Solid , and Ninja Gaiden all relegated their cool-as-heck heroes to secondary or non-existent players.

In the last decade or so, we have seen a slight increase in male-led game series shifting to female MCs , and it seems set to continue with God of War Laufey and The Witcher 4 . This trend isn't extremely common by any means, and it tends to occur after the original protagonist's story reaches a natural conclusion (for the time being). Although rarer, the reverse also occasionally happens, with Control Resonant being a current example.

Let's highlight a few major series that decided to give their men a rest and introduce a woman protagonist, even if the substitution just lasted for a game or two.

Pac-Man To Ms. Pac-Man

The Original Male For Female Switch

  • Follow
    Followed
    Pac-Man
    Maze
    Systems
    Released
    July, 1980
    Developer(s)
    Namco
    Publisher(s)
    Namco, Midway Games
    Franchise
    Pac-Man

    Genre(s)
    Maze
    Platform(s)
    Arcade, Atari 2600, intellivision, Commodore 64
    Powered by
  • Follow
    Followed
    Ms. Pac-Man
    Action
    Arcade
    Systems
    Released
    1981
    ESRB
    E For Everyone
    Developer(s)
    General Computer Corporation, Bandai Namco Studios, Midway Games
    Publisher(s)
    Midway Games, Bandai Namco Entertainment
    Franchise
    Pac-Man

    WHERE TO PLAY

    DIGITAL

    Genre(s)
    Action, Arcade
    Platform(s)
    Arcade, Atari 2600, Atari 5200, Commodore 64, Apple II, ZX Spectrum, Atari 8-bit, Nintendo Entertainment System, Sega Genesis, Sega Master System, Nintendo Game Boy, Atari Lynx, SNES, Nintendo Game Boy Color, PC, PlayStation 4, Xbox One, Nintendo Switch
    Powered by

Yeah, this trend by no means started in the current century; in fact, the first big mascot-driven franchise gender-bended its protagonist for its very first sequel. Pac-Man 's legacy is cemented in stone, paving the way for Ms. Pac-Man to perfect the formula. With smarter AI and less predictable mazes, the sequel helped broaden gaming's appeal in general, proving to be just as important as the first entry.

Now, in truth, Ms. Pac-Man is just Pac-Man with a pink bow and lipstick, and they effectively play in the same way. Still, she became iconic in her own right, and she even starred in a few standalone games around the turn of the century. Pac-Man never really stopped being regarded as the franchise's primary mascot, but his wife's impact on gaming shouldn't be discounted.

The Walking Dead – Lee To Clementine

It Was Always Clementine's Story

The Walking Dead
Released
April 24, 2012

WHERE TO PLAY

DIGITAL

Developer(s)
Telltale Games
Genre(s)
Graphic Adventure, Horror
Platform(s)
PlayStation 4, PlayStation 3, PlayStation Vita, Xbox One, Xbox 360, PC, Mobile
Powered by

Occasionally, these transitions can be a bit clunky, but the absolute best franchises seamlessly integrate the switch into their narratives. Telltale's definitive masterpiece, The Walking Dead , handled the passing of the torch better than any other game series, with Lee effectively dedicating all his time preparing Clementine for a future without him. Through season 1, Lee (and players) constantly make choices designed to shape her character and turn her into a true survivor, along with establishing a very strong emotional connection between the two leads.

By the time the switch happens, Clementine already feels like The Walking Dead 's protagonist, and she more than succeeds in carrying the franchise for the next few seasons. We get to see this terrified 8-year-old girl become a hardened survivor, a journey spread over roughly a decade. Fantastic stuff.

The Last of Us – Joel To Ellie

Maybe The Most Famous Protagonist Switch In Gaming History

  • Follow
    Followed
    The Last of Us
    Action
    Adventure
    Systems
    10 /10
    OpenCritic Reviews
    Top Critic Avg: 94 /100 Critics Rec: 99%
    Released
    June 14, 2013
    ESRB
    M for Mature: Blood and Gore, Intense Violence, Sexual Themes, Strong Language
    Developer(s)
    Naughty Dog
    Publisher(s)
    Sony

    WHERE TO PLAY

    DIGITAL
    PHYSICAL

    Genre(s)
    Action, Adventure
    Platform(s)
    PS3, PS4
    Powered by
  • Follow
    Followed
    The Last of Us Part 2
    Action
    Adventure
    Systems
    10 /10
    Released
    June 19, 2020
    ESRB
    M for Mature: Blood and Gore, Intense Violence, Nudity, Sexual Content, Strong Language, Use of Drugs
    Developer(s)
    Naughty Dog

    WHERE TO PLAY

    DIGITAL

    Play the winner of over 300 Game of the Year awards, remastered for the PlayStation®5 console. Relive or play for the first time Ellie and Abby’s story, now with graphical enhancements, new gameplay modes like the roguelike survival experience No Return, full DualSense® wireless controller integration, and more. Five years after their dangerous journey across the post-pandemic United States, Ellie and Joel have settled down in Jackson, Wyoming. Living amongst a thriving community of survivors has allowed them peace and stability, despite the constant threat of the infected and other, more desperate survivors. When a violent event disrupts that peace, Ellie embarks on a relentless journey to carry out justice and find closur

    Genre(s)
    Action, Adventure
    Platform(s)
    PlayStation 4, PlayStation 5
    Powered by

Essentially, The Last of Us followed The Walking Dead 's blueprint as Joel stepped aside to let Ellie take charge. Famously, this transition proved to be a bit polarizing, but that's not really the point of this article. Even in the first game, Ellie is by far the most important character, with her existence serving as the inciting incident and, also, the reason behind Joel's gradual transformation. She even gets her own extended section, "Winter," which happens to be the best chapter in the series, along with starring in the brilliant "Left Behind" expansion.

The Last of Us tells maybe the most beloved surrogate father/daughter story in gaming history, and Part 2 explores the aftermath of that dynamic. From the sequel's reveal and marketing, Naughty Dog put Ellie front and center, showing that she would be stepping into the lead role. This shift translated to an improved combat system that emphasized agility and stealth over brute strength, with the latter being left for Abby's sections.

Who’s That Character?

Dishonored – Emily & Corvo

Corvo Shares The Spotlight With Emily

Dishonored 2
Released
November 11, 2016

WHERE TO PLAY

SUBSCRIPTION
DIGITAL
PHYSICAL

Developer(s)
Arkane Studios
Genre(s)
FPS, Action
Platform(s)
PC, PlayStation 4, Xbox One
Powered by

OK, let's go with something a bit different here. Corvo doesn't disappear from the numbered Dishonored entries, and he serves as the sequel's dual protagonist with Emily. Early on, players decide whether to play the campaign as one or the other, and both come with fully developed, unique skill sets that grant endless freedom in how to approach scenarios.

Gameplay-wise, Corvo and Emily are both completely valid options; story-wise, the latter fits just a little bit better due to having a more personal dynamic with the main villain, Delilah. According to this 2016 Mashable article, Arkane Studios initially conceived Dishonored 2 as Emily's game, with Corvo acting as the secondary protagonist to an extent.

At this point, Dishonored 3 seems unlikely to happen, although there's always hope that another entry would materialize.

Silent Hill – Harry To Heather

Stepping Aside For His Daughter

  • Follow
    Followed
    Silent Hill
    Survival Horror
    Systems
    Released
    January 31, 1999
    ESRB
    M For Mature 17+ Due To Animated Blood and Gore, Animated Violence
    Developer(s)
    Konami
    Publisher(s)
    Konami
    Engine
    Unreal Engine

    WHERE TO PLAY

    PHYSICAL

    Genre(s)
    Survival Horror
    Platform(s)
    PS1
    Powered by
  • Follow
    Followed
    Silent Hill 3
    Survival Horror
    Systems
    Released
    August 6, 2003
    ESRB
    M For Mature 17+ Due To Blood and Gore, Violence
    Developer(s)
    Konami
    Publisher(s)
    Konami
    Engine
    unreal engine

    WHERE TO PLAY

    PHYSICAL

    Genre(s)
    Survival Horror
    Platform(s)
    PC, PS2, PS3, Xbox 360
    Powered by

For the most part, Silent Hill tells standalone stories that introduce new protagonists, with nearly all of them being male. Konami set Silent Hill 3 apart from the rest of the series in a couple of ways. Firstly, it is a direct sequel to the original game. Secondly, it moves away from the "everyman" protagonist archetype that grounded its predecessors. Finally, it is the only entry out of the first 7 to feature a female main character.

As Harry's daughter, who was introduced at the end of Silent Hill , Heather stood out due to looking and acting like a relatively realistic 17-year-old girl, which also helped set her apart from Resident Evil ​​​​​​'s famous female protagonists. Her vulnerability supercharged the horror, creating an incredibly intense psychological experience filled with incredible imagery.

Nier – Gestalt To 2B

Nier:Automata Made The Series Into A Household Name

  • Follow
    Followed
    Nier
    Action RPG
    Systems
    Released
    April 27, 2010
    ESRB
    t
    Developer(s)
    Cavia
    Publisher(s)
    Square Enix
    Engine
    Toylo Engine [Note 1]
    Franchise
    NieR

    WHERE TO PLAY

    PHYSICAL

    Genre(s)
    Action RPG
    Platform(s)
    PS3, Xbox 360
    Powered by
  • Follow
    Followed
    NieR: Automata
    Action RPG
    Open-World
    Systems
    10 /10
    OpenCritic Reviews
    Top Critic Avg: 89 /100 Critics Rec: 93%
    Released
    March 7, 2017
    ESRB
    M for Mature: Blood, Partial Nudity, Strong Language, Violence
    Developer(s)
    Platinum Games
    Publisher(s)
    Square Enix

    WHERE TO PLAY

    DIGITAL
    PHYSICAL

    Genre(s)
    Action RPG, Open-World
    Platform(s)
    Xbox One, PC, Nintendo Switch, PlayStation 4
    Powered by

Every franchise mentioned in this article was already very successful when they made the switch... except Nier . Don't get me wrong, Drakengard and the 2010 game had earned a cult following, but they certainly weren't anywhere close to being big hits.

Then, Nier:Automata arrived and instantly launched the series into relative superstardom. 2B became Nier 's face, completely overshadowing the two former protagonists. In 2017, Automata had already sold more than 2 million copies, an absurd amount for what used to be an incredible niche IP. Obviously, that figure is much higher nowadays. The sequel's success even gave its predecessor a second chance at life courtesy of a remake.
